subcodes.first_line: O kind-hearted friends! The Zoroastrians are heavenly souls who suffer trials, tribulations and tests in Yazd and its environs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهربان یاران زردشتی بهشتی اند و از بلا و فتنه و امتحانات در یزد و حوالی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @consolation and comfort, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
